steps.title: Check current k0s deployment
steps.description:
Verify your k0s version and configuration:
```bash
k0s version
k0s status
```
This feature requires a working k0s installation.

steps.title: Review k0s configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant k0s configuration:
```bash
k0s version
k0s kubectl get nodes -o wide
k0s kubectl get pods -A
```
Tracking issue for updating k0s to containerd 2.0. The containerd RCs are already available.

Upgrading to 2.0 is not so simple. Both hcsshim and Helm also depend on containerd 1.x and will continue to pull it in as a transitive dependency.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Update to containerd 2.x
steps.description:
Bumps [github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim](https://github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim) from 0.11.5 to 0.12.4.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim's releases.

v0.12.4

What's Changed

  • [release/0.12] Backport networking commits by @​kiashok in

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
k0s kubectl get nodes -o wide
k0s kubectl get pods -A
k0s kubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Update to containerd 2.x" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A running k0s cluster or a system where k0s can be installed.
